# discord_member_roles (Resource)

Authoritatively manages the set of roles assigned to a guild member. This resource owns the member's full role set (excluding the implicit `@everyone` role): it sets exactly the listed roles and clears them on destroy. Roles not listed here are **removed** from the member.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manages the full set of roles assigned to a guild member.
resource "discord_member_roles" "alice" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
  user_id   = "345678901234567890"
  roles = [
    "234567890123456789",
    "234567890123456790",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `roles` (Set of String) Snowflake IDs of the roles the member should have (excluding `@everyone`).
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.
- `user_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the member's user.
